sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: TNGX stock hits record high on inking collaboration deal with ERAS
feed.summary: The article reports that TNGX stock has reached a record high following the announcement of a new collaboration deal with ERAS. This partnership is likely perceived positively by investors, driving the significant increase in TNGX's stock value.

feed.title: EPR Properties Closes Acquisition of 6 US Parks From Six Flags Entertainment
feed.summary: EPR Properties (EPR) has finalized the acquisition of six parks from Six Flags Entertainment Corporation (SIX), marking a significant strategic move for both companies. This transaction allows Six Flags to capitalize on its assets while EPR expands its portfolio of experiential real estate. The financial details of the acquisition, including the implied valuation of the parks and the leaseback arrangements, position EPR as a key player in the leisure and entertainment property sector.

feed.title: Why Is Columbia U.S. Equity Income ETF (EQIN) Stock Up Today?
feed.summary: Columbia U.S. Equity Income ETF (EQIN) stock is up 0.73% today, trading at $49.44, indicating positive investor sentiment despite a 21% lower trading volume than its average. Technical analysis shows short-term weakness as it trades below its 50-day moving average but long-term strength above its 200-day moving average. Meyka's AI assigns EQIN a 'B' grade, forecasting potential returns of +0.20% in one month and +15.81% over five years.

feed.title: How T-Mobile shifted its mentality around behavioral data
feed.summary: T-Mobile has transformed its approach to customer surveys by integrating behavioral data with survey data, significantly reducing survey length from 10 minutes to two minutes. This shift allows the company to ask only about unknown aspects of customer experience, making surveys more efficient and improving completion rates. By encouraging cross-departmental use of behavioral data and leveraging Qualtrics' AI, T-Mobile effectively identifies and resolves customer pain points, such as difficulty finding information online, ensuring a better digital experience.

feed.title: Rheos Capital Works Inc. Buys 27,000 Shares of Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Rheos Capital Works Inc. increased its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 38.6%, acquiring an additional 27,000 shares to own a total of 97,000 shares valued at approximately $55.57 million. This makes Caterpillar the fund's fifth-largest holding, representing about 3.6% of its portfolio. The article also notes recent analyst upgrades for Caterpillar's stock and the company's strong performance in its latest quarterly earnings report, beating both EPS and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Citi Maintains Intuitive Surgical(ISRG.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $590
feed.summary: Citi has reiterated its Buy rating for Intuitive Surgical (ISRG.US) and maintained its target price at $590. This indicates a continued positive outlook from Citi on the company's stock performance.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands Faces Analyst Skepticism
feed.summary: Jefferies downgraded Las Vegas Sands stock from "buy" to "hold" due to concerns over the cost of attracting premium mass market customers in Macau and required reinvestments. While recent financial results were strong, with a 25% year-over-year revenue increase in Q4 2025, analysts predict a significant slowdown in earnings per share growth for 2026. The company faces challenges from diversification efforts in Macau focusing on lower-return non-gaming attractions and increased competition in the premium mass market.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts Price Target on ConocoPhillips to $140 From $130, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for ConocoPhillips (COP) shares to $140 from $130, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects the firm's updated valuation of the energy company.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on PNC Financial Services to $237.50 From $251, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has lowered its price target on PNC Financial Services Group Inc. to $237.50 from $251, while still maintaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a moderated outlook for the financial services company. The article also notes recent price target changes from other firms such as Goldman Sachs, Evercore ISI, and HSBC, indicating a broader reassessment of PNC Financial Services by analysts.

feed.title: Investor demand drives Blackstone credit fund past $10B hard cap
feed.summary: Blackstone (NYSE: BX) announced the final close of its Capital Opportunities Fund V (COF V) with over $10 billion in investable capital, hitting its hard cap due to strong investor demand. This fund builds on Blackstone Credit & Insurance's 20-year track record, with its opportunistic credit strategy achieving a 13% net IRR since 2007. The firm now manages $520 billion in total credit assets, highlighting its robust capabilities in private credit.

feed.title: S&P 500 Futures Decline in Premarket Trading; Valmont Industries, Loews Lag
feed.summary: S&P 500 futures are declining in premarket trading, with specific companies like Valmont Industries and Loews lagging. Conversely, Humana Inc. (HUM) and Brookfield Wealth Solutions Ltd. (BNT) are showing significant gains, up 9.8% and 9.7% respectively, as the U.S. stock markets approach their open. This article provides an early look at market movements before trading begins.

feed.title: Akamai to discuss first-quarter results and outlook on May 7
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ: AKAM) announced it will hold an investor conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 4:30 PM ET to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results. The call will also include potential forward-looking financial guidance from management and will be webcast live on Akamai's Investor Relations page, with a replay available for two weeks. The company, a cybersecurity and cloud computing provider, will detail its performance and outlook during this event.

feed.title: Hospital for Special Surgery surgeon takes top tech role at Zimmer Biomet
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet (NYSE: ZBH) has appointed Dr. Jonathan M. Vigdorchik as its Chief Science, Technology and Medical Affairs Officer, effective April 14, 2026. Dr. Vigdorchik, an experienced orthopedic surgeon from Hospital for Special Surgery, will oversee the company's global technology portfolio, including AI, robotics, smart implants, and data, along with Medical Education and the Global Advisory Board. This appointment underscores Zimmer Biomet's continued focus on advancing innovation in musculoskeletal care, particularly in robotics and AI.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Appoints Dr. Jonathan M. Vigdorchik as Chief Science, Technology and Medical Affairs Officer
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. has announced the appointment of Dr. Jonathan M. Vigdorchik as Chief Science, Technology and Medical Affairs Officer, effective April 14th. In this role, Dr. Vigdorchik, an experienced orthopedic surgeon from the Hospital for Special Surgery, will oversee the company's global technology portfolio, including AI, robotics, smart implants, and data, as well as its Medical Education strategy. This appointment aims to enhance Zimmer Biomet's clinical engagement, innovation roadmap, and external scientific leadership in musculoskeletal care.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Citizens Financial PT to $68 From $71, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has adjusted its price target for Citizens Financial Group (CFG) to $68, down from $71, while reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This move reflects a revised outlook from the financial institution on CFG's valuation. The article also notes other recent analyst adjustments for Citizens Financial Group.

feed.title: Kroger Co stock: What you should know now as grocery wars heat up
feed.summary: Kroger Co stock offers stability and dividend appeal in a competitive grocery market due to its vast network and blend of traditional and digital services. As a defensive stock, it provides portfolio stability and a hedge against inflation for investors globally. Analysts view Kroger positively for its resilience and dividend, making it a pragmatic choice for long-term wealth building despite challenges like labor costs and intense competition.

feed.title: 67,665 Shares in Philip Morris International Inc. $PM Acquired by Talbot Financial LLC
feed.summary: Talbot Financial LLC recently acquired 67,665 shares of Philip Morris International (NYSE: PM) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $10.85 million, establishing a significant new position. This comes amidst noteworthy insider selling in February, with CEO Jacek Olczak and CFO Emmanuel Babeau both reducing their holdings by substantial amounts. Despite mixed analyst ratings including recent downgrades, the consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with a $196.83 price target, and the company has issued FY2026 EPS guidance and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.47.

feed.title: Blackstone Inc. $BX Holdings Lowered by Rheos Capital Works Inc.
feed.summary: Rheos Capital Works Inc. decreased its stake in Blackstone Inc. by 13.8% in Q4 2025, selling 11,000 shares and retaining 68,500 shares valued at approximately $10.56 million. The article also highlights significant insider trading activity, including a large sale by Tactical Opportunit and a major purchase by Holdings Iv Gp Mana. Despite a mixed analyst view with a "Hold" consensus and an average price target of $162.10, Blackstone recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.49 per share.

feed.title: Talbot Financial LLC Trims Stake in Adobe Inc. $ADBE
feed.summary: Talbot Financial LLC significantly reduced its stake in Adobe Inc. by 88.8% in Q4, selling over 45,000 shares but still holding 5,768 shares worth approximately $2.02 million. Despite this reduction and mixed analyst sentiment (average "Hold" rating), Adobe reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates for EPS and revenue, and reiterated its FY 2026 guidance. Various other institutional investors also modified their holdings, with some purchasing new positions in the company.

feed.title: RBC Lowers Price Target on Huntington Bancshares to $20 From $21, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets has reduced its price target for Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) to $20 from $21, while maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects a recent trend among analysts, as several other firms have also revised their price targets for the bank. Despite the lowered targets, most analysts continue to recommend a Buy or Outperform rating for Huntington Bancshares.

feed.title: Rheos Capital Works Inc. Sells 112,000 Shares of Teradyne, Inc. $TER
feed.summary: Rheos Capital Works Inc. reduced its stake in Teradyne, Inc. by 64% in the fourth quarter, selling 112,000 shares and leaving it with 63,000 shares valued at approximately $12.19 million. Despite this, Teradyne showed strong performance, beating earnings and revenue expectations, leading to analyst upgrades and an average "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $275.53. Other major institutional investors, including Wellington Management, Alkeon Capital, and Assenagon Asset Management, significantly increased their positions in the company.

feed.title: Ford Motor Company stock: What you should know now before Q1 earnings
feed.summary: This report analyzes Ford Motor Company's position ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report on April 29th, focusing on its core business in trucks and SUVs, the pivot to electric vehicles, and market performance. It weighs the risks and opportunities for investors, considering factors like EV losses, high interest rates, and competitive landscape. The article provides insights into what global investors should watch in the upcoming earnings report to make informed decisions about buying, holding, or selling Ford stock.

feed.title: Deere Settles Class Action Right-to-Repair Lawsuit
feed.summary: Deere & Company has agreed to a $99 million settlement in a class-action lawsuit concerning "right-to-repair" practices for large agricultural equipment. The agreement, awaiting judicial approval, will establish a fund for farmers who paid for repairs from January 2018 and commits Deere to providing digital repair tools for 10 years. Despite this settlement, Deere still faces a separate lawsuit brought by the U.S. Federal Trade Commission regarding alleged monopolistic practices in the tractor repair aftermarket.

feed.title: Wells Fargo to invest $6 million into improving outcomes in west Charlotte
feed.summary: Wells Fargo announced a $6 million investment in west Charlotte to improve community opportunities. The financial institution aims to support local initiatives and development projects. This investment underscores Wells Fargo's commitment to enhancing well-being and economic prospects in the area.

feed.title: Chevron Stock Soars Amid Surge in Global Oil Prices
feed.summary: Chevron's stock has surged as global oil prices, particularly Brent crude, rose sharply due to the war with Iran. The increase in oil prices significantly boosts Chevron's annualized earnings, with every $1 rise translating to an additional $600 million for the company. Furthermore, Chevron is pursuing growth opportunities like a deal for production rights in Venezuela and a partnership with Microsoft to develop a gas-fired power plant, which could further enhance its output and reduce earnings volatility.

feed.title: Blackstone hits $10 billion cap for opportunistic credit fund - Bloomberg News
feed.summary: Blackstone has reportedly capped its opportunistic credit fund at $10 billion. The article from Bloomberg News was published on MarketScreener. This information is reserved for members of the MarketScreener platform.

feed.title: Hydrogen Fueling Station Market 2026-2033 | US$ 3,472 Million
feed.summary: The global Hydrogen Fueling Station Market, valued at US$ 628.9 million in 2025, is projected to reach US$ 3,472 million by 2033, demonstrating a CAGR of 23.80% during the forecast period. This growth is driven by increasing adoption of hydrogen fuel cell vehicles, government initiatives, technological advancements, and investments in clean energy. Key players include Air Liquide, Air Products and Chemicals, Inc., and China Petrochemical Corporation, with North America and Europe leading market share due to strong infrastructure investments and decarbonization goals.

feed.title: See the list of Minnesota’s largest employers and Target’s new ranking
feed.summary: Minnesota's 16 largest employers saw a 1% reduction in their workforce over the last year, with Mayo Clinic retaining its position as the largest employer. Target Corp. dropped from third to fourth place after cutting 3,000 jobs, while the state and federal governments reported significant employment increases. Financial services companies, U.S. Bancorp and Wells Fargo, experienced the steepest job reductions.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs reinstates Fifth Third Bancorp stock coverage with buy rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reinstated coverage of Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) with a Buy rating and a $55.00 price target, suggesting a 16% upside from its current trading price of $47.56. This positive outlook follows Fifth Third Bancorp’s acquisition of Comerica Bank, with Goldman Sachs expecting the combined entity to achieve a high return on tangible common equity and significant cost savings and revenue synergies. Despite ongoing legal challenges related to Tricolor Holdings, the bank's recent merger and consistent dividend increases highlight its strategic developments and potential appeal to income-focused investors.

feed.title: Who's Moving Where In Wealth Management? – Aiviq, MetLife
feed.summary: Aiviq, a client data management platform, has appointed Nicholas Morse as head of revenue for the Americas to lead commercial strategy and growth. MetLife Investment Management has named Andrea Drasites as head of real estate and agricultural finance, succeeding Robert Merck. These appointments highlight significant personnel changes in the North American wealth management sector.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on Truist Financial to $51.50 From $57, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has revised its price target for Truist Financial (TFC) down to $51.50 from $57, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a shift in analyst expectations for the financial holding company. The news comes amid several other analyst revisions for Truist Financial from firms like Raymond James, Goldman Sachs, and HSBC.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Adjusts Price Target on CSX to $46 From $44, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has increased its price target for CSX Corporation to $46 from $44, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects analysts' views on the company's valuation and future prospects. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments for CSX.

feed.title: News - Wynn Resorts data breach impacts over 21,000 employees following HR system attack
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts, a luxury hospitality and gaming company, recently disclosed a data breach that affected over 21,000 employees. The breach, which occurred in October 2025 following a cyberattack on its internal HR systems, compromised personal information.

feed.title: Buy a Domino's pizza, unlock access to Shinola watches and leather goods
feed.summary: Domino's is running a promotional campaign where customers who purchase a Handmade Pan or Parmesan Stuffed Crust pizza online through May 7, 2026, will gain exclusive access to a co-branded Shinola merchandise collection at a preferred rate. Additionally, these customers will receive a free Slice Sauce through June 14, 2026. The Shinola collection, available from May 8, includes customized watches and leather goods in black and gold packaging, celebrating both brands' Michigan origins and Domino's new premium Slice Sauce.

feed.title: Time to buy shares of Morgan Stanley, says UBS
feed.summary: UBS has upgraded Morgan Stanley to a "buy" rating from "neutral" and raised its price target to $196, citing the investment banking giant's resilience amidst market headwinds. Analyst Erika Najarian highlighted Morgan Stanley's history of embracing new technologies and its potential to benefit from deregulation in the banking sector. Despite the stock's year-to-date decline and a consensus of "hold" ratings from other analysts, UBS believes Morgan Stanley is well-positioned for future growth.

feed.title: BD Launches HemoSphere Stream Module for Continuous Blood Pressure Monitoring
feed.summary: BD has launched its HemoSphere Stream™ Module, a new noninvasive technology for continuous blood pressure monitoring. This module, used with the VitaWave™ Plus Finger Cuff, provides real-time arterial waveform data, improving patient safety by allowing earlier detection of hemodynamic changes. The innovation aims to enhance care quality and solidify BD's leadership in medical technology.

feed.title: Notice of BetMGM 1Q 2026 Update and Conference Call
feed.summary: BetMGM LLC, a joint venture between MGM Resorts International and Entain plc, announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 business update on Tuesday, April 14, 2026. The update will cover the period from January 1 to March 31, 2026, and will be followed by a webcast call and Q&A session for investors. This notice also provides details for upcoming results from Entain and MGM Resorts International.

feed.title: North America's biggest grid gets new backup power, savings option
feed.summary: Generac (NYSE: GNRC) and CPower announced a collaboration to deploy distributed energy resources (DER) across PJM, North America's largest grid. This partnership aims to enhance resiliency, reduce energy costs for commercial and industrial (C&I) customers, and enable access to wholesale revenue streams. By combining Generac's C&I product portfolio and dealer network with CPower's 6.7 GW Virtual Power Plant (VPP) capacity and market access, the initiative will allow C&I customers to participate in capacity, ancillary services, energy, and on-bill programs.

feed.title: Generac and CPower Expand Access to DER Technologies to Support Resiliency, Energy Costs and Grid Capacity
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. and CPower Energy have announced a collaboration to provide Distributed Energy Resources (DER) technologies to commercial and industrial (C&I) customers in PJM, North America's largest electricity market. This partnership combines Generac's DER solutions with CPower's Virtual Power Plant (VPP) and demand response services, allowing customers to utilize distributed generation like battery energy storage systems and microgrids. The initiative aims to enhance energy resiliency, reduce costs, and strengthen grid capacity by enabling C&I customers to participate in various energy programs.

feed.title: Raymond James Trims Price Target on Truist Financial to $53 From $56, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has lowered its price target for Truist Financial (TFC) to $53 from $56, while maintaining an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment follows similar actions by other firms, with JPMorgan also adjusting its target to $51.50 and Goldman Sachs to $54. Despite these target reductions, Truist Financial continues to receive positive ratings like "Outperform" and "Buy" from several analysts.

feed.title: Jefferies cuts First Solar stock price target on logistics cost concerns
feed.summary: Jefferies has lowered its price target for First Solar Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) to $187 from $205, maintaining a Hold rating due to growing concerns about inflationary logistics costs caused by the Middle East conflict. The firm anticipates these costs will impact near-term margins and reduced its fiscal year 2026 margin profile. The stock has already seen a 25% decline year-to-date, despite First Solar being considered undervalued relative to its Fair Value by InvestingPro analysis.

feed.title: Sionna Therapeutics to Participate in the Raymond James 2026 Biotech Innovation Symposium
feed.summary: Sionna Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on cystic fibrosis treatments, announced its management will participate in one-on-one investor meetings at the Raymond James 2026 Biotech Innovation Symposium on April 14, 2026. The company is developing novel medicines to normalize CFTR protein function, specifically targeting the F508del genetic mutation. Sionna aims to improve clinical outcomes and quality of life for CF patients through its pipeline of NBD1 stabilizers and complementary CFTR modulators.

feed.title: Inlet Private Wealth LLC Takes $1.38 Million Position in General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Inlet Private Wealth LLC has acquired a new stake of 4,089 shares, valued at approximately $1.38 million, in General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) during the fourth quarter. The company has a "Moderate Buy" analyst rating with an average target price of $384.42, reported strong quarterly earnings of $4.17 EPS and $14.38 billion in revenue, and raised its quarterly dividend to $1.59. Despite insider sales totaling over $18 million in the last 90 days, institutional investors own a significant 86.14% of the stock.

feed.title: Newbridge Financial Services Group Inc. Cuts Stock Position in AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Newbridge Financial Services Group Inc. significantly reduced its holdings in AT&T Inc. by 87.2% during the fourth quarter, selling 262,882 shares and ending with 38,431 shares valued at $955,000. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors increased their positions in AT&T, and the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $30.74. AT&T also recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share, yielding 3.9% annually, and reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, beating analyst estimates.

feed.title: Inlet Private Wealth LLC Decreases Stake in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC $STX
feed.summary: Inlet Private Wealth LLC reduced its stake in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC (NASDAQ:STX) by 20.9% in the fourth quarter, selling 12,464 shares to hold 47,186 shares valued at $12.995 million. Despite this reduction by one firm, institutional ownership remains high at 92.87%, with several other hedge funds increasing their positions. Seagate continues to show strong financial performance, with analysts issuing multiple upgrades and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating, driven by robust earnings beats, dividend announcements, and positive sentiment linked to AI/data-center expansion.

feed.title: BTIG Adjusts Price Target on ServiceNow to $185 From $200, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: BTIG has revised its price target for ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) to $185 from $200, while continuing to recommend a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes despite several other firms also modifying their price targets for ServiceNow recently, reflecting ongoing analyst evaluations of the company's financial outlook. ServiceNow, a developer of digital workflow solutions, remains a focus for institutional investors.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Synchrony Financial to $90 From $93, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Synchrony Financial (SYF) to $90 from $93, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This comes as other research firms like Autonomous Research, Seaport Global, Barclays, Evercore ISI, and TD Cowen have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for Synchrony Financial. The company specializes in credit card issuance and marketing, managing a significant portfolio of loan receivables and active accounts.

feed.title: Raymond James Downgrades Axos Financial (AX) Price Target | AX S
feed.summary: Raymond James has lowered its price target for Axos Financial (AX) from $110.00 to $100.00 but upgraded the stock's rating from "Outperform" to "Strong Buy." This adjustment comes despite several other analysts maintaining or raising their price targets for AX. Axos Financial, a bank holding company, focuses on financing residential properties and small to medium-sized businesses, primarily in California.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Chubb to $356 From $333, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Chubb Limited (CB) to $356 from $333, while reiterating a "Hold" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes as other analysts, including HSBC, Wolfe Research, and Goldman Sachs, have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for the Multiline Insurance & Brokers company. Chubb Limited is a Switzerland-based holding company offering a wide range of insurance and reinsurance products globally.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs reinstates Fifth Third Bancorp stock coverage with buy rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reinstated coverage of Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) with a Buy rating and a $55.00 price target, predicting a 16% upside from its current trading price of $47.56. This positive outlook follows Fifth Third Bancorp's acquisition of Comerica Bank, with Goldman Sachs anticipating significant cost savings and revenue synergies from the merger. The bank is expected to achieve a return on tangible common equity of approximately 19% or higher, alongside continued dividend increases.
